name: docguard
description: Deterministic doc-drift detection: guard, score, explain, verify-claims, report and diagnose as read-only MCP tools.
long_description: DocGuard validates your project's documentation against its code — 27 deterministic validators, CDD maturity score, compliance-evidence reports, requirements traceability — with a zero-LLM core. Every tool is read-only: it inspects the project folder you choose and never writes, mutates, or reaches the network. Local-first: no telemetry, no data collection (see PRIVACY.md in the repository).

project_dir.title: Project folder
project_dir.description: The repository DocGuard analyzes by default. Every tool also accepts a per-call projectDir override.

tools.name: docguard_guard
tools.description: Run every enabled validator against the project's canonical docs

tools.name: docguard_score
tools.description: CDD maturity score (0-100) with per-category breakdown

tools.name: docguard_explain
tools.description: Explain a stable finding code (STR001, ENV003, ...)

tools.name: docguard_verify_claims
tools.description: Extract documented numbers/limits/enums as verification tasks

tools.name: docguard_report
tools.description: Commit-stamped compliance-evidence bundle with integrity hash

tools.name: docguard_diagnose
tools.description: Only what needs fixing, shaped for an agent to act on
